# External Reference Documents — Project 003 (ArcKit Consulting)

Place external reference documents in this directory and ArcKit commands will read them automatically and embed inline citations.

## What goes here

- RFP / ITT / specification documents from public sector buyers
- Crown Commercial Service framework agreements (G-Cloud, DOS, MCF)
- Procurement Policy Notes (PPN)
- DSIT, GDS, CDDO, NCSC published policy and guidance
- Industry research, market sizing, competitor analyses
- Case study source material (with client consent)
- Legal and compliance documents (DPIAs, security accreditations) provided by clients

## What does NOT go here

- ArcKit-generated artefacts (those go in the project root or `decisions/`, `diagrams/`, etc.)
- Live client-confidential data — put that on appropriate client-issued storage, not in this repo
- Anything classified above OFFICIAL — this directory is OFFICIAL maximum

## Naming

Use lowercase-hyphenated filenames: `ccs-g-cloud-14-framework.pdf`, `cddo-cloud-strategy-2024.pdf`, `ppn-03-23-payment-practices.pdf`.

## Currently empty

No external documents are present at the time of project creation. Place documents here and re-run the relevant ArcKit command to embed citations.
